headline: Boeing, Airbus, Major Airlines Push Congress for $20 Billion to Modernize Air Traffic Control: Report
summary: The U.S. aviation sector is reportedly pushing lawmakers to approve a funding package worth $20 billion to modernize the country’s aging air traffic control (ATC) systems, as well as curb flight disruptions. Next-Generation Tech According to a Reuters report on...

headline: Boeing Comes to Air Show Carrying Weight of Trump’s Influence
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Kelly Ortberg attends his first Farnborough Air Show next week as Boeing Co. chief executive officer, looking to pry orders away from Airbus SE while walking a fine political line as US President Donald Trump claims his outsized influence over the planemaker’s sales.Most Read from BloombergFCC Near Rulings Against Disney Over ‘The View,’ TV LicensesTaylor Farms Pulls Mexican Lettuce as Parasite Cases RiseChip Stocks Slide Into Bear Market in AI Unwind: Markets WrapSpaceX Slump Wip
